name: nhso-claim-desktop
description: NHSO Claim & Patient Kiosk Desktop Application

scripts.build:backend: python -m PyInstaller --name backend --onedir --clean --noconfirm --hidden-import=uvicorn.logging --hidden-import=uvicorn.loops --hidden-import=uvicorn.loops.auto --hidden-import=uvicorn.protocols --hidden-import=uvicorn.protocols.http --hidden-import=uvicorn.protocols.http.auto --hidden-import=uvicorn.protocols.websockets --hidden-import=uvicorn.protocols.websockets.auto --hidden-import=uvicorn.lifespan --hidden-import=uvicorn.lifespan.on --hidden-import=uvicorn.lifespan.off --hidden-import=pymysql --hidden-import=pyodbc --hidden-import=sqlalchemy --hidden-import=passlib.handlers.bcrypt --collect-all fastapi --collect-all uvicorn --collect-all pydantic --collect-all jinja2 app/main.py
scripts.dist: npm run build:backend && npm run build:electron
